original_title: JUL-313 This Husband And Wife Went On A Training Trip And Fucked This Married Woman Employee Behind Her Husband's Back Momoko Isshiki
overview: I am the president of a micro-enterprise company with several employees. It's a small company that can't be established without helping each other, so I thought that Isshiki, who had quit once, had a connection, so I hired him mid-career with my wife Momoko. However, instead of being grateful, he made a fool of me behind the scenes and disturbed the circle of the company. Day by day, black emotions swirl in me ... That's it! Momoko is serious and obedient. In addition, my husband came with a scrap (laughs). I made a plan to make her a meat guy on a training trip.
